config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  quantile (0.999) (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['duration_ns']))) as "duration_ns_.999_quantile",
  quantile (0.99) (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['duration_ns']))) as "duration_ns_.99_quantile",
  quantile (0.9) (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['duration_ns']))) as "duration_ns_.9_quantile",
  max (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['duration_ns']))) as max_duration_ns,
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime64(Timestamp, 3), INTERVAL 100 MILLISECOND) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
FROM
  default.otel_logs
WHERE
  (
    Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli ({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
    AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli ({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  )
  AND (EventName = 'writer_hot_path_canonical_log_line')
  AND toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['duration_ns'])) > 0
GROUP BY
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime64(Timestamp, 3), INTERVAL 100 MILLISECOND) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
ORDER BY
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime64(Timestamp, 3), INTERVAL 100 MILLISECOND) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
LIMIT
  100000
config.name: Writer Hot Path Service Time

config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  quantile (0.99) (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['duration_ns'])) / 1000) as "duration_us_.99_quantile",
  max (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['duration_ns'])) / 1000) as max_duration_us,
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(Timestamp), INTERVAL 1 second) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
FROM
  default.otel_logs
WHERE
  (
    Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli ({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
    AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli ({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  )
  AND (EventName = 'writer_client_sync_step_one_canonical_log_line')
  AND toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['duration_ns'])) > 0
GROUP BY
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(Timestamp), INTERVAL 1 second) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
ORDER BY
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(Timestamp), INTERVAL 1 second) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
LIMIT
  100000
config.name: Client Sync Step One Service Time

config.name: Reader Hot Path Service Time

config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  sum (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['update_size_bytes']))) as "operation_volume_bytes",
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime64(Timestamp, 3), INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
FROM
  default.otel_logs
WHERE
  (
    Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli ({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
    AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli ({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  )
  AND (
    EventName = 'reader_hot_path_canonical_log_line' 
    OR EventName = 'reader_client_sync_step_two_canonical_log_line'
  )
  AND toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['update_size_bytes'])) > 0
GROUP BY
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime64(Timestamp, 3), INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
ORDER BY
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime64(Timestamp, 3), INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
LIMIT
  100000
config.name: Operation Volume Per Second

config.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  quantile (0.999) (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['update_size_bytes']))) as "update_size_bytes_.999_quantile",
  quantile (0.99) (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['update_size_bytes']))) as "update_size_bytes_.99_quantile",
  quantile (0.9) (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['update_size_bytes']))) as "update_size_bytes_.9_quantile",
  quantile (0.5) (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['update_size_bytes']))) as "update_size_bytes_.5_quantile",
  max (toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['update_size_bytes']))) as max_update_size_bytes,
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime64(Timestamp, 3), INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
FROM
  default.otel_logs
WHERE
  (
    Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli ({startDateMilliseconds:Int64})
    AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli ({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
  )
  AND (EventName = 'reader_hot_path_canonical_log_line')
  AND toFloat64OrDefault(toString(LogAttributes['duration_ns'])) > 0
GROUP BY
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime64(Timestamp, 3), INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
ORDER BY
  toStartOfInterval(toDateTime64(Timestamp, 3), INTERVAL 1 SECOND) AS `__hdx_time_bucket`
LIMIT
  100000
